svg.title: Coral Catalog architecture and MVP flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture from raw data sources through a 4-stage catalog generation pipeline, into an optimized catalog, and finally to an A/B evaluation harness comparing Coral-only vs Catalog+Coral agent responses.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the GitHub PRs data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the deployments data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the incidents data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Sentry events data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Slack messages data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the support tickets data source')
sendPrompt('How does Source Discovery work in Coral Catalog?')
sendPrompt('How does Relationship Discovery work in Coral Catalog?')
sendPrompt('How does Semantic Annotation work in Coral Catalog?')
sendPrompt('How does Context Optimization work in Coral Catalog?')
sendPrompt('What is in the Optimized Catalog?')
sendPrompt('What kind of investigation questions can I ask Coral?')
sendPrompt('How does the Coral-only agent path work in the benchmark?')
sendPrompt('How does the Catalog+Coral agent path work in the benchmark?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does the A/B harness measure?')

svg.text: click any node to ask a follow-up question
